entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research on watershed infrastructure is conducted

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: The state in India where the experimental study on community reservoirs was performed

entities.name: SMALL RESERVOIRS
entities.description: Surface water storage structures that recharge shallow groundwater aquifers

entities.name: SHALLOW GROUNDWATER AQUIFERS
entities.description: Underground water-bearing layers recharged by surface reservoirs

entities.name: WATERSHED PROJECTS
entities.description: Initiatives aimed at the sustainable management of water infrastructure

entities.name: WATER INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: Physical structures used for water storage and management in watersheds

entities.name: COOPERATION
entities.description: Collective action and agreement among community members for maintenance and management

entities.name: MAINTENANCE
entities.description: The ongoing upkeep of water infrastructure to ensure sustainability

entities.name: EXPERIMENTAL STUDY
entities.description: A research approach used to understand cooperation patterns in Rajasthan communities

entities.name: FARMERS
entities.description: Local agricultural practitioners who are the target of awareness and cooperation efforts

entities.name: DIALOGUE
entities.description: Communication process used to facilitate shared learning and decision making

entities.name: SHARED LEARNING
entities.description: The process of gaining knowledge collectively through dialogue

entities.name: COLLECTIVE DECISION MAKING
entities.description: The process of making group decisions regarding resource management

entities.name: ADAPTIVE MANAGEMENT CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of local communities to adjust management strategies based on experience

entities.name: FRAMED PUBLIC GOOD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Game-theoretic experiments used to study stakeholder behavior and cooperation

entities.name: COMMUNITY LEADERS
entities.description: Local figures who participated in the public good experiments

entities.name: LOCAL STAKEHOLDERS
entities.description: Individuals with a vested interest in the management of watershed infrastructure

entities.name: COMMUNICATION
entities.description: The exchange of information between participants in the experiment

entities.name: SOCIAL INFORMATION
entities.description: Data regarding the decisions and behaviors of other players revealed during the experiment

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL MECHANISMS
entities.description: Rules and structures introduced as treatments in the experimental game

entities.name: STANDARD ECONOMIC THEORY
entities.description: The theoretical baseline used to predict participant behavior in economic games

entities.name: PRIVATE DECISION MAKING
entities.description: The act of making choices without communication or social information

entities.name: INVESTMENTS
entities.description: The amount of resources contributed by players in the public good game

entities.name: PUNISHMENT
entities.description: The act of sanctioning other players to enforce cooperation and increase contributions
